0.1.0.en: New official Go-e App for the Gemini, CORE and PRO evChargers

0.2.1.en: Changed to a single driver for all local network discovery. Supports Home+(V3), Gemini, CORE and PRO models.

0.2.2.en: Cloud app compatibility checks and corrections.

0.3.0.en: Deprecate single driver in favour of model drivers.

0.4.0.en: Break: Refactored PV Surplus charging mode and added a flow card to set the values for go-eCharger.
